owner: Worker — single source of truth for tier→grants and pack→grants mappings. Mirrored to pack-engine at build time. ANY tier or grant change starts here.

starter.description: Free forever per ADR-004. The full governance substrate — not crippleware.

pro_trial.description: 90-day Pro Trial auto-activated on first install. Activation bridge between Starter and Solo.

solo.description: The behavioral intelligence specialist. MOAT anchor tier.

pro.description: Solo + compliance + Proactive Watch full + MemPalace semantic + brand overlay.

professional.description: Pro + unlimited Brand & Design Pro + unlimited voice + priority support.

team.description: Professional × 5 seats + shared MemPalace KG + team audit trails.

healthcare-overlay.description: HIPAA-deep + ISO 13485 + ISO 14971 + FDA submission scaffolding. Stackable on any paid tier.

legal-overlay.description: DPIA-grade privacy + jurisdictional compliance map + DPA generation. Stackable on any paid tier.

fintech-overlay.description: PCI-DSS deep + SOX + DORA + payment-flow modeling. Stackable on any paid tier.

govtech-overlay.description: FedRAMP-foundation NIST SP 800-53 + AIBOM + ISO 42001. Stackable on any paid tier.

grants_catalog.agents-all: All Maxim specialist agents (90 as of v1.0.1; auto-tracks AGENT_SKILL_INVENTORY.md Section 1)
grants_catalog.skills-all: All Maxim domain skills (34 as of v1.0.0; auto-tracks AGENT_SKILL_INVENTORY.md Section 2)
grants_catalog.commands-all: All Maxim slash commands (38 as of v1.0.0; auto-tracks AGENT_SKILL_INVENTORY.md Section 3)
grants_catalog.executive-routing: Executive office routing via /mxm-route and /mxm-{office} commands
grants_catalog.ceo-automation: CEO Automation skill — overnight + morning briefing cycles
grants_catalog.framework-stubs-10: 10 behavioral framework stubs (names + descriptions; not full deep-dive)
grants_catalog.frameworks-64: All 64 behavioral frameworks fully dispatchable (FRAMEWORKS_MASTER.md complete)
grants_catalog.watch-classes-4: 4 free Proactive Watch drift classes (inventory, version, cross-doc, stale-handoff)
grants_catalog.proactive-watch-full: Full Proactive Watch including triage routing and recurring-pattern detection
grants_catalog.behavioral-audit-50-per-month: behavioral_audit MCP tool capped at 50 calls per month
grants_catalog.compliance-14: All 14 compliance frameworks (GDPR, PIPEDA, PCI-DSS, SOC2, HIPAA, UAE-PDPL, CASL, FINTRAC, EU AI Act, ISO 27001, ISO 13485, ISO 14971, NIST CSF, WCAG 2.1)
grants_catalog.compliance-hipaa-deep: HIPAA depth beyond compliance-14 (BAAs, ePHI flow modeling, breach notification)
grants_catalog.compliance-iso-14971: ISO 14971 medical device risk management depth
grants_catalog.compliance-pci-dss-deep: PCI-DSS depth beyond compliance-14 (SAQ generation, cardholder-data-flow modeling)
grants_catalog.compliance-dora: EU DORA financial operational resilience (v1.1 framework)
grants_catalog.mempalace-local: MemPalace local file mode (no semantic search)
grants_catalog.mempalace-team-shared: MemPalace shared KG across team seats with audit trail
grants_catalog.team-audit-trails: Per-seat audit logs visible to team admin
grants_catalog.team-seats-5: Up to 5 team member seats under one billing entity
grants_catalog.voice-10min-per-day: Voice mode capped at 10 minutes/day (Whisper STT + Kokoro TTS)
grants_catalog.brand-overlays-20-per-month: Brand voice overlay applied to up to 20 outputs per month
grants_catalog.brand-design-pro-unlimited: Brand & Design Pro skill suite unlimited
grants_catalog.brand-templates-59: 59 brand DESIGN.md templates (MIT-licensed; cannot be revoked)
grants_catalog.adr-010-rubric: Technical Educator confidence rubric (Basis, Gap, Mitigation, Next)
grants_catalog.dpia-generation: Data Protection Impact Assessment full generation (Legal)
grants_catalog.vendor-dpa-generation: Vendor DPA tailored to project compliance scope (Legal)
grants_catalog.payment-flow-modeling: Payment-flow data model + cardholder-data scope analysis (Fintech)
grants_catalog.aibom-generation: AI Bill of Materials (SPDX 3.0) generation (GovTech, EU AI Act Art. 53)
